notes: Add multi-TF scoring engine: TAS (Trend Alignment Score) across M30/M15/M5, BSS (Breakout Strength Score on M15 candle: body/ATR + volume + RSI momentum - wick penalty), FTS (Final Trade Score = TAS + BSS*0.6 - spread penalty - HTF opposition penalty). Liquidity trap hard-reject (wick/range > 60% or counter-trend vs H4+H1). Entry gate: BUY if FTS >= +0.65, SELL if FTS <= -0.65. Full scoring breakdown printed in Trade Decision Logger.
